custom-sql.sql: SELECT AssetCategory.categoryId FROM AssetCategory [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (AssetCategory.vocabularyId = ?) AND (AssetCategory.parentCategoryId = ?)

INNER JOIN AssetCategoryProperty AS AssetCategoryProperty[$i$] ON AssetCategoryProperty[$i$].categoryId = AssetCategory.categoryId WHERE (AssetCategoryProperty[$i$].key_ = ?) AND (AssetCategoryProperty[$i$].value = ?)
